BTC.reasoning: Setup coerente per flat: trend ribassista dominante (SMA -14%) ma controbilanciato da taker buy >1 e Extreme Fear (contrarian). Derivati mostrano funding neutro e OI in calo, senza momentum chiaro. Peso Fear & Greed come conflitto, non driver unico. Nessuna contraddizione grave che giustifichi veto o riduzione conviction.

ETH.reasoning: Flat resta coerente: trend fortemente negativo (SMA -17%, underperformance BTC) domina nonostante Extreme Fear e taker buy aggressivo. F&G pesato come conflict perché taker positivo ma funding negativo + long/short alto indicano sentiment misto, non chiaro contrarian né momentum.

BEAT.reasoning: Setup fragile: RSI 93 e +270% sopra SMA segnalano ipercomprato estremo dopo pump violento, mentre Fear=8 è contrarian ma contrastato da taker buy e funding positivo. Momentum e derivati in conflitto; abbasso conviction di 1 per incoerenza interna.

H.reasoning: Extreme Fear (F&G=8) points to contrarian long risk, yet aggressive taker sells, negative funding and collapsing OI confirm downside momentum. The explicit contrarian vote in the provisional decision creates internal conflict, warranting a -1 adjustment; setup remains viable but fragile.

GWEI.reasoning: Setup fragile: rally +71% 7d con RSI 72 e distanza SMA 36% rende il long esteso nonostante Extreme Fear. Derivati mostrano momentum (funding >0, long/short crescente) ma taker neutro; Fear agisce da contrarian solo parziale, generando conflitto.

SIREN.reasoning: Short squeeze setup intact (negative funding, OI +26%, L/S 0.67). Extreme Fear treated as conflict rather than clean contrarian signal because it clashes with +101% 7d parabolic move and +82% dist to SMA. Overextension justifies -2 adjustment; no veto.

WLD.reasoning: Setup fragile: Extreme Fear labeled contrarian for long, yet long/short at 1.71 and falling OI show crowded longs already. Strong momentum and BTC outperformance clash with fear signal, creating conflict rather than clean contrarian setup. F&G weighted as conflict given derivatives and price action.
